manifest.scope: Named category classes and category-valued wrapper constructors in src/sage/categories, including sage.categories.examples, plus source-declared axioms and functorial constructions.
manifest.note: Empirical snapshot. Runtime parents from super_categories() when probe present; declared parents from defining_relation. Does not correct Sage defects.
